creator: erwin@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: analyzed->open

-exp run completed with three direct errors, but only 15027 
finished packages, most likely caused by a cluster error that 
preventet php52-extensions to build. 

Will need a rerun with those 3 ports fixed.
